description: Unit: in-app artifact orchestrator is invoked for new-ticket flow after ticket/comment creation
Unit: in-app artifact orchestrator is invoked for threaded-reply flow after comment creation
Integration: attachment base64 bytes from inbound payload persist to external_files and documents rows
Integration: attachment document is associated to target ticket via document_associations
Unit: data:image payload extraction in in-app path emits deterministic synthetic attachment records
Unit: only HTML-referenced CID inline parts are extracted; unreferenced inline parts are skipped
Integration: extracted embedded images persist as ticket documents with expected content type and size
Unit: in-app .eml source selection prefers rawMimeBase64 then sourceMimeBase64 then rawSourceBase64
Unit: deterministic fallback MIME assembly is used when raw source fields are absent
Integration: one .eml document is created and associated per inbound message in in-app flow
Integration: .eml filename matches original-email-<sanitized-message-id>.eml
Integration: duplicate inbound message does not create duplicate provider attachment documents
Integration: duplicate inbound message does not create duplicate embedded-image documents
Integration: duplicate inbound message does not create duplicate .eml documents
Integration: artifact persistence failure is recorded and ticket/comment creation still succeeds
Webhook integration: IMAP callback processes via in-app mode when IMAP in-app flag is enabled
Webhook integration: IMAP callback follows configured fallback path when in-app mode is disabled
Webhook integration: over-limit single attachment is skipped with attachment_over_max_bytes reason
Webhook integration: total attachment byte cap skips overflow attachments with attachment_total_bytes_exceeded reason
Webhook integration: attachment count cap emits attachment_count_exceeded for excess attachments
Webhook integration: raw MIME over-cap emits raw_mime_over_max_bytes and .eml persistence is skipped
Unit: app-local async queue mode accepts callback payload and defers byte-heavy artifact processing
Integration: app-local async queue enforces bounded per-message artifact concurrency
Contract: inbound payload schema accepts attachments.content/isInline/contentId and MIME source fields
Contract: malformed attachment content payloads fail validation safely without crashing callback
Integration: Google in-app path uses shared artifact orchestrator and persists all artifact classes
Integration: Microsoft in-app path uses shared artifact orchestrator and persists all artifact classes
Integration: IMAP in-app path persists regular attachments, referenced embedded images, and .eml artifacts on ticket
Playwright: ticket Documents tab shows one regular attachment, one embedded image, and one .eml for inbound message
Docs: GreenMail/IMAP in-app artifact test runbook includes setup, send message, and verification steps
